mdSummary:
# Button

Versatile button with variants, sizes, icons, and loading states.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Forms/Buttons & Actions
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/button

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Button | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| Button | LeftIcon | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| Button | RightIcon | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| Button | Variant | `ButtonVariant` | `ButtonVariant.Default` |  |
| Button | Size | `ButtonSize` | `ButtonSize.Default` |  |
| Button | FullWidth | `bool` | `` |  |
| Button | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| Button | OnClick | `EventCallback<Microsoft.AspNetCore.Components.Web.MouseEventArgs>` | `` |  |
| Button | Disabled | `bool` | `` |  |
| Button | IsLoading | `bool` | `` |  |
| Button | LoadingText | `string?` | `` |  |
| Button | PressEffect | `ButtonPressEffect` | `ButtonPressEffect.None` | Visual feedback when the button is pressed down. Default is None (no press animation — original behaviour). |
| Button | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (Button) — RenderFragment slot
- `LeftIcon` (Button) — RenderFragment slot
- `RightIcon` (Button) — RenderFragment slot

## Events
- `OnClick` (`EventCallback<Microsoft.AspNetCore.Components.Web.MouseEventArgs>`)

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- (none)

## Services it injects
- `IComponentInteropService` (Lumeo.Services)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<Button />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-accent`, `--color-accent-foreground`, `--color-background`, `--color-destructive`, `--color-destructive-foreground`, `--color-input`, `--color-primary`, `--color-primary-foreground`, `--color-ring`, `--color-secondary`, `--color-secondary-foreground`, `--radius`
